howItWorksPage.title: Simplicity at its {finest}.
howItWorksPage.desc: We've reinvented the way you connect with services. Fast, secure, and built for the modern world.
howItWorksPage.forCustomersDesc: Beautifully simple service booking. From cleaning to complex repairs, get it done in four easy steps.
howItWorksPage.forProfessionalsDesc: Turn your skills into a thriving business. Set your own rules and reach thousands of local customers.
howItWorksPage.readyToExperience: Ready to Experience the {future} of Services?

customerSteps.step1Desc: Browse our curated marketplace of verified local providers. Filter by reviews, expertise, and price.
customerSteps.step2Desc: Schedule your service instantly with our intuitive booking system. Choose a time that fits your life.
customerSteps.step3Desc: Your money is held securely and only released when you're 100% satisfied with the completed work.
customerSteps.step4Desc: Enjoy your newly serviced home. Share your experience with a review to help our provider community grow.

workerSteps.step1Desc: Create a standout provider profile. Showcase your certifications, portfolio, and unique skills.
workerSteps.step2Desc: You're the boss. Define your services, set your own pricing, and control your availability.
workerSteps.step3Desc: Connect with high-quality users in your area. Receive real-time leads and manage requests seamlessly.
workerSteps.step4Desc: Receive guaranteed payments promptly. Build your online reputation and watch your business thrive.

aboutPage.title: Redefining the {service} Economy.
aboutPage.desc1: Founded in 2024, Ambi Tasker was born out of a simple idea: finding high-quality local services should be as easy as ordering a coffee. We're bridging the gap between talent and need.
aboutPage.coreValuesDesc: These principles guide everything we do, from how we build our software to how we support our community.
aboutPage.meetVisionariesDesc: Our diverse team of engineers, designers, and community builders is dedicated to your success.

values.trustDesc: We verify every professional and protect every transaction, ensuring peace of mind for everyone.
values.precisionDesc: Our algorithms connect you with the right expertise based on your specific needs and location.
values.communityDesc: We're more than a platform; we're a community built on mutual respect and quality service.
values.efficiencyDesc: We value your time. From booking to payment, every step is optimized for maximum speed.

hero.title:
Book Trusted
Services Instantly
hero.desc: The easiest way to find and book verified professionals for your home and lifestyle needs. Quality service, guaranteed.
hero.searchPlaceholder: Need a plumber? Or maybe a decorator?

services_ui.title: Popular Services
services_ui.desc: Verified providers for every task, from repairs to life's big events.

hiw.title: How It Works
hiw.desc: Three simple steps to get your to-do list done.
hiw.step1Desc: Tell us what you need and where you are located.
hiw.step2Desc: Choose a verified expert based on reviews and price.
hiw.step3Desc: Sit back while we handle the task with perfection.

wcu.title:
We build trust
with every visit.
wcu.desc: Serving our community with integrity and excellence. We ensure your home is in safe hands.
wcu.feat2Desc: Book a service in under 60 seconds.
wcu.feat3Desc: Upfront pricing with no hidden surprises.
wcu.feat4Desc: Dedicated support team for your peace of mind.
wcu.testimonialQuote: "Always a pleasure helping families in the area!"

testimonials.title: What our community says
testimonials.desc: Join thousands of satisfied neighbors in Haripur.
testimonials.t1Content: Found a reliable plumber in minutes. The work was exceptional and the price was fair.
testimonials.t2Content: As a working professional, AmbiTasker is a lifesaver. Their tutors for my kids are great.
testimonials.t3Content: High quality service! The cleaning team did a fantastic job on my apartment.

transform.title: Ready to Transform your space?
transform.desc: Join thousands of satisfied customers who trust Ambi Tasker for their daily operational needs.

trustPillars.verifiedDesc: Every professional undergoes a strict background check and identity verification process.
trustPillars.regionalDesc: Local experts from your own community, ensuring fast response times and regional trust.
trustPillars.mobileDesc: Manage bookings, track providers, and handle payments directly from your smartphone.

cta.title:
Ready to get
started today?
cta.desc: Join thousands of satisfied customers and professionals. Your next service is just a click away.

providerOnboarding.reviewMessage: Your profile is now being reviewed. Providers are typically approved within 24-48 hours.

steps.selfieMandatory: A live biometric selfie is mandatory for account verification
steps.cnicFrontRequired: Clear scan of CNIC front is required for identity matching
steps.cnicBackRequired: Clear scan of CNIC back (address side) is required
steps.bioTooShort: Your professional bio must be at least 20 characters long
steps.selfieDesc: Align your face inside the frame. Ensure good lighting and a clear background.
steps.cnicFrontDesc: Place the front (side with photo) of your identity card in the frame.
steps.cnicBackDesc: Place the back (side with address) of your identity card in the frame.
steps.bioPlaceholder: Describe your skills to potential customers...
steps.serviceIntelligenceDesc: Selecting a primary trade enables targeted job notifications.

hints.personal: Ensure your name matches your CNIC exactly for faster approval.
hints.selfie: Move to a well-lit area. Remove glasses or masks if possible.
hints.cnicFront: Place your card on a flat, dark surface to avoid glare.
hints.cnicBack: Ensure the barcode or chip area is clearly visible.
hints.locationBio: Be specific about your skills to attract high-paying jobs.
hints.categoryServices: This determines which jobs you'll see on your dashboard.
hints.review: Carefully review all data. You cannot change this after submission.

camera.alignFace: Align your face inside the frame
camera.alignCnicFront: Place CNIC Front fully inside the frame
camera.alignCnicBack: Place CNIC Back fully inside the frame
camera.invalidFormat: Invalid image format. Please use JPG or PNG.
camera.fileTooLarge: File size is too large. Max limit is 5MB.
camera.poorLighting: Poor lighting detected. Please move to a brighter area and retake.
camera.accessDenied: Camera access denied. Please grant permission in your browser settings.
camera.noCameraFound: No camera detected. Please connect a camera to proceed.
camera.cameraInUse: Camera is already in use by another application. Please close other apps and try again.
camera.failedToAccessCamera: Unable to start camera. Please check your hardware and try again.
camera.permissionDenied: Camera access was denied. Please enable it in your browser settings to continue.
camera.permissionDesc: We need camera access to capture high-quality photos for identity verification.

verification.title: Identity Verification
verification.subtitle: Professional Badge Verification
verification.introDesc: To maintain a safe community, all service providers must verify their identity using a valid National ID Card (CNIC).
verification.cnicInvalid: Please enter a valid 13-digit CNIC number.
verification.frontDesc: Take a clear photo of the FRONT side of your CNIC card.
verification.backDesc: Take a clear photo of the BACK side of your CNIC card.
verification.selfieDesc: Take a live photo of yourself to match with your ID card.
verification.secureCaptureDesc: Your data is encrypted and used only for verification purposes.
verification.successDesc: We have received your documents. Our team will review them within 24-48 hours.
verification.errorDesc: Something went wrong while uploading your documents. Please try again.
verification.instruction2: Keep the card within the frame
